compounds.frequency: once every 10 days (maintenance); daily for 5 days (loading phase)

benefits.description: Insane tan achieved; tanning 1-2 times per week in a tanning bed

side_effects.description: Nausea experienced, especially when taking during the day. Taking at night during loading phase mitigated this.

protocol_notes: Loading protocol: 200mcg daily for 5 days with 1-2 tanning sessions per week. Maintenance: 200mcg once every 10 days with 1-2 tanning sessions per week. Started after Christmas and still on first bottle. Plans to try MT1 next. Recommends taking at night to avoid nausea.
